revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=2012_crimes_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 4 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25098527498|time triggered pipeline]]
